days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers later. Force 2 to 4 east to southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Light winds, becoming force 2 to 3 northeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds.
